column5: Root Cause Description
column8: Manual Resolution Steps

column5: Upstream SDO endpoint outage or network path failure to NASA servers
column6: Solar imagery missing; downstream image pipeline stalls; forecasts degrade
column8: 1) Verify external status: curl -I https://sdo.gsfc.nasa.gov/data/ 2) Switch to fallback mirror: update endpoint in /etc/ingest/sdo.yaml and redeploy: kubectl rollout restart deploy/sdo-ingestor 3) Backfill missing intervals via ingest-backfill --source=sdo --from -6h
column9: Implement multi-endpoint failover with health checks; circuit breaker w/ exponential backoff

column5: ACE telemetry endpoint responding >30s due to upstream throttling
column6: Partial data gaps; model inputs stale
column8: If auto-failover misses: kubectl exec ace-ingestor -- curl -sS $ACE_URL; increase timeout in configmap (ingest-timeouts.yaml) and apply; trigger backfill: ingest-backfill --source=ace --from -2h
column9: Use async retries with jitter; maintain cached last-known-good frames

column4: DSCOVR feed returning 429 Too Many Requests
column5: Exceeded upstream rate limits due to retry storm
column6: Data delay; risk of blackouts in features
column8: Throttle consumers: kubectl set env deploy/dscovr-ingestor MAX_QPS=5; purge retry queue: rdkafka-consumer --topic dscovr-retry --reset-offsets --to-latest --execute
column9: Token-bucket rate limiting; exponential backoff; retry budgets

column4: Kafka consumer lag increasing for raw-telemetry topic
column5: Slow consumer due to CPU throttling on node
column8: Scale up: kubectl scale deploy/telemetry-consumer --replicas=6; verify autoscaler HPA thresholds
column9: Enable autoscaling on CPU and lag; pin to performance nodes

column5: Inefficient query plan; missing index on time_bucket + instrument_id
column6: Dashboards and feature queries fail; model latency spikes
column8: Add index: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY ON telemetry (instrument_id, time DESC); increase statement_timeout temporarily: ALTER ROLE app SET statement_timeout='30s'; analyze: VACUUM (ANALYZE) telemetry;
column9: Maintain index policy; scheduled EXPLAIN plans; pgbouncer pooling

column4: LSTM inference failure: RuntimeError: shape mismatch
column5: Model artifact version incompatible with feature schema
column8: Rollback model: mlflow models serve -m models:/lstm/Production@prev; or helm rollback inference-lstm 1; re-sync feature store schema
column9: Freeze schema; contract tests in CI; canary deploy

column4: ViT crash: CUDA out of memory
column5: Batch size too large for GPU; memory fragmentation
column8: Auto reduces batch size via env MAX_BATCH=8; manual: nvidia-smi; restart pod: kubectl rollout restart deploy/vit-infer; set torch.set_grad_enabled(False)
column9: Right-size GPU; enable memory pooling; monitor fragmentation

column5: Burst from client exceeded per-key quota
column8: Check logs: kubectl logs -l app=api-gateway; raise limit for whitelisted partner: kubectl edit configmap rate-limits; notify client
column9: Leaky-bucket per key; sensible defaults; client guidance

column4: Webhook delivery failure: TLS handshake error
column5: Client endpoint TLS mismatch or expired cert
column8: Validate with: curl -v https://client.example.com/webhook; rotate trusted CA bundle; coordinate with client to update TLS; retry queued alerts: alert-retry --tenant=client
column9: Mutual TLS validation; certificate expiry alerts

column5: WAL growth due to long-running transactions and backup lag
column8: Free space: pg_archivecleanup; terminate long txns: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state='idle in transaction'; expand PV: kubectl -n db patch pvc/db-data -p '{...}';
column9: WAL archiving monitoring; quotas; vacuum policies

column5: Target endpoint /metrics returning 500 due to auth misconfig
column6: Gaps in observability; alerting blind spots
column8: Fix ServiceMonitor selector; verify auth header: kubectl describe servicemonitor; restart exporter

column4: Prediction accuracy drop below threshold (<0.7 AUC)
column5: Data drift from upstream instrument calibration change
column6: Degraded alert quality; potential false negatives
column8: Run drift report: feast-drift --window 24h; retrain with latest data; switch to fallback ensemble: helm upgrade --set useEnsemble=true
column9: Data drift monitors; calibration change notifications

column4: Redis connectivity error: READONLY You can't write against a read only replica
column5: Failover happened; writers still pointing to replica
column8: Update endpoint to primary via Sentinel: redis-cli -p 26379 SENTINEL get-master-addr-by-name mredis; update secret; restart
column9: Use Redis Sentinel/Cluster with automatic failover

column5: Pgbouncer pool maxed due to spike or leak
column8: Increase pool: pgbouncer.ini max_client_conn; kill idle conns: SHOW POOLS; RELOAD; fix app pooling settings
column9: Connection pooling best practices; reuse; circuit breakers

column5: Downstream webhook latency high or network jitter
column8: Queue retry: alert-worker --retry; extend timeout in notifier.conf; trace with curl --http2-prior-knowledge
column9: Backoff + dead-letter queues; SLAs with clients

column5: JWT expired; client not refreshing
column8: Rotate key if necessary; contact client; extend grace: edit OPA policy to allow refresh window
column9: Token refresh guides; refresh tokens; proactive expiry alerts

column4: GPU driver mismatch with CUDA toolkit
column5: Node image updated without driver compatibility
column8: Drain node: kubectl drain ; install matching driver: nvidia-smi, sudo apt install nvidia-driver-; cordon/uncordon
column9: Use node image pinning; preflight checks in CI

column4: Alert rule eval errors in Prometheus
column5: Syntax error after rules update
column8: Check promtool: promtool check rules rules/*.yaml; fix and reload via POST /-/reload

column5: Backpressure from slow downstream processing
column8: Scale processors: kubectl scale deploy/feature-extractor; increase Kafka partitions: kafka-topics --alter --partitions 8

column5: Null pointer due to unexpected missing fields
column8: Hotfix: kubectl set env deploy/fe-service STRICT_MODE=false; add null guards; restart

column5: Background worker blocked by lock
column8: Cancel job: SELECT pg_cancel_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE query LIKE '%compress%'; reschedule; analyze
column9: Schedule during low traffic; lock monitoring

column4: Cache invalidation error for /forecast cache key
column5: Stale responses served after model update
column8: Purge key: curl -X PURGE https://api/cache/forecast?key=...; fix invalidation hook in CI
column9: Event-driven cache busting on model deploy

column5: Provider throttling due to quota
column8: Switch to secondary SMTP: kubectl patch secret smtp-cred-secondary; reroute in notifier config

column5: Broken panel after import
column8: Fix JSON and re-import; grafana-cli dashboards import

column4: Network partition between ingest and Kafka
column5: Calico network policy misconfig or node failure
column6: No events written; full pipeline paused
column8: Rollback network policy: kubectl rollout undo ds/calico; reroute via alternate broker; verify with kcat -b broker:9092 -L
column9: Blue/green network policy changes; chaos tests

column5: Models diverge due to drift or bug
column8: Fallback to conservative model: set ENSEMBLE_MODE=weighted; investigate features alignment

column5: External catalog responding slowly
column8: Increase timeout to 20s; add retry: curl --max-time 20; queue enrichment for async
column9: Cache recent CME entries; mirror data

column5: Deadlock in OpenCV worker pool
column6: No new frames; image features stale
column8: Dump threads: kubectl exec img-proc -- py-spy dump; restart: kubectl rollout restart deploy/img-proc; apply patch to remove GIL bottleneck

column5: High write rate; bloat increasing
column8: Tune autovacuum: ALTER TABLE ... SET (autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor=0.05); run manual VACUUM FULL during maintenance

column4: CORS preflight failing for partner domain
column5: Misconfigured allowed origins
column8: Update gateway configmap allowed_origins to include partner; redeploy

column5: Third-party FCM/APNS outage
column8: Route to backup channel (email/SMS); requeue for retry

column5: Retention too long; high series cardinality
column8: Prune retention: --storage.tsdb.retention.time=15d; delete high-cardinality labels; expand PV

column5: Unreleased tensors or images
column8: Enable periodic worker restart; add torch.no_grad(); profile with tracemalloc

column5: Network saturation or long queries
column8: Throttle heavy queries; tune wal_sender_timeout; investigate network

column4: Coordinate transformation error: NaN in HEEQ to GSM
column5: Invalid input vector or division by zero
column8: Clamp inputs; add validation; fix lib call; unit tests

column5: Upstream pods crashloop or DNS issue
column8: Check svc endpoints: kubectl get endpoints inference; restart pods; resolve DNS

column5: Provider partial outage
column8: Failover to secondary provider; retry backlog

column4: Blackbox probe latency > SLA to client webhooks
column5: Network path congestion
column8: Adjust timeout; reroute via alternate egress; mtr to diagnose

column5: Artifact store outage or S3 gateway issue
column8: Switch to cached artifacts; set REGISTRY_READ_ONLY=true; escalate to storage team; s3cmd ls s3://models

column5: Broker down or DNS/balancer issue
column6: Producers fail; data loss risk if buffers full
column8: Failover to other brokers; update bootstrap servers; verify with kcat -b ... -L

column5: Concurrent updates on same rows
column8: Identify blockers: SELECT * FROM pg_locks JOIN pg_stat_activity; reorder transactions; add retries

column5: Airflow DAG error due to missing dependency
column6: New model not produced; stale model remains
column8: Airflow: mark task retry; install dependency: pip install scikit-image==0.22; rerun DAG

column4: Health check endpoint returning 200 but dependencies down
column5: Health endpoint not checking downstreams
column8: Enhance /healthz to include dependency checks; add /readyz with probes

column4: Duplicate messages detected in Kafka topic
column5: Producer retries without idempotence
column8: Enable idempotent producer; dedup by key in consumer; compact topic

column5: Permanent failures accumulating
column6: Potential data loss if not reprocessed
column8: Investigate top DLQ reasons; reprocess: alert-dlq-replay --batch 1000

column5: Silence not extended; noisy alerts resumed
column8: Extend silence via Alertmanager API; document timeline

column5: S3 permissions error: AccessDenied
column8: Fix IAM policy; rerun: wal-g backup-push; verify restore

column5: K8s limits too low; noisy neighbors
column8: Increase limits: kubectl set resources deploy/lstm-infer --limits=cpu=4; taint/label nodes

column5: Rotated keys not propagated
column8: Sync JWKS cache; restart pods; verify kid
column9: Cache invalidation on key rotate; shorter TTL

column4: Data quality threshold violation: missing fields >2%
column5: Upstream schema change or partial outages
column8: Activate fixup: jq to fill defaults; update schema mapping; notify provider
